rationale: The reserved corporate name being transferred. Reuses MBCA-1's name_reservation.name_to_reserve key — semantically the same name, just at a later moment in its 120-day reservation lifecycle.

The original applicant who reserved the name (the transferor). Reuses MBCA-1's name_reservation.applicant.name — same conceptual identity, just on the transfer form rather than the original reservation form.
Name of the person/entity receiving the reservation. New schema-gap key parallel to name_reservation.applicant.name; lives in the same name_reservation.* namespace rather than a top-level transfer.*.
Single-line transferee address (form does not split components). Parallel shape to MBCA-1's name_reservation.applicant.address.
Date the transferor signed the document.

label_verbatim: ORIGINAL APPLICANT (Transferor) / (signature of any duly authorized person) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined printed-name-and-capacity widget for the transferor (or duly authorized person signing on the transferor's behalf). Reuses MBCA-1's name_reservation.applicant.printed_name_and_capacity rather than filing.signer.printed_name_and_capacity, mirroring MBCA-1's choice to keep the applicant-signed shape under the name_reservation.* namespace (the form has no separately formed entity yet — there is no 'filing entity' to attach a generic filing.signer.* to).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive). Typically populated with the reserved name being transferred.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite enum value 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite enum value '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite enum value 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($20 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — like MBCA-1, this field is meaningless on a name-reservation transfer (no entity is created), but the cover-letter primitive includes it. Typically left blank.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
